name: Slot Table
description: Suppresses repetition and wrong-gender pronouns; boosts named entities.

block_bytes.description: byte values forced to -inf at every step; default blocks the corpus separator (NUL).

ngram_n.description: n-gram window length used for repetition blocking. 0 disables.

ngram_penalty.description: logit subtracted from any byte that would extend the current (n-1)-byte suffix into an n-gram already seen in the window.

rep_penalty.description: softmax-style multiplicative penalty on bytes seen recently in the lookback window. 1.0 disables.

rep_lookback.description: how many recent bytes feed the repetition penalty.

name_boost.description: logit added to the first byte of any 'named X' entity at word-start (not sentence-start). 0 disables.

pronoun_penalty.description: logit subtracted from byte continuations that would complete a wrong-gender pronoun (he/she/his/her/etc.). 0 disables.

window_bytes.description: rolling-window size (bytes) over which all observations apply.
